summary: Add published-article edit lifecycle support and local cover image upload.
reason: A browser edit HAR showed that changing a published Article requires ArticleEntityUnpublish before UpdateContent and ArticleEntityPublish after. The cover image flow also requires upload.x.com INIT, APPENDMULTI, FINALIZE before ArticleEntityUpdateCoverMedia.
validated_outcome: Live CLI run updated and republished Article 2053246975311503364 with MARKDOWN code blocks and cover media 2053253930239266817.
